interpretation: The Fine-Gray model keeps 10,702 merger-window bank-quarters in the failure risk set (as guaranteed non-failures) that the cause-specific model drops. The two OOT PR-AUCs and mean predicted incidences are within noise of each other, confirming the competing-risks correction is small here - consistent with only 2.2% of merger exits being distressed (see COMPETING_RISKS.md). The cause-specific (censoring) model is therefore an adequate approximation; Fine-Gray is provided as the formal cross-check, not a material change to the served ranking.
